events.name: Atlanta Braves at Pittsburgh Pirates

highlights.headline: Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Mike Yastrzemski hit a game-sealing grand slam in the ninth inning, Matt Olson hit a first-inning home run while tying the franchise record for consecutive games played and the Atlanta Braves defeated the Pittsburgh Pirates 10-5 on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mike Yastrzemski hits grand slam in Braves' 10-5 win over Pirates

video.headline: Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

events.name: Kansas City Royals at New York Mets

highlights.headline: Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tyrone Taylor, who entered when Mark Vientos suffered a fractured right hand after being hit by a pitch, hit the game-tying homer to start a five-run fifth inning Thursday, powering the New York Mets to a 7-3 win over the Kansas City Royals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mets use 5-run 5th inning to surge to 7-3 win over Royals

video.headline: Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

highlights.description: Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jeremiah Jackson hit a two-run double in the bottom of the eighth inning to lift the Baltimore Orioles to a 3-2 victory over the Chicago Cubs on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson's big hit in the 8th helps the Orioles avoid a sweep, 3-2 over the Cubs

events.name: Cleveland Guardians at Minnesota Twins

highlights.headline: Guardians avoid the sweep with 5-2 win over the Twins
highlights.description: Guardians avoid the sweep with 5-2 win over the Twins

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Guardians avoid the sweep with 5-2 win over the Twins) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Gavin Williams pitched seven dominant innings, Gabriel Arias, Chase DeLauter and Patrick Bailey hit home runs and the Cleveland Guardians beat the Minnesota Twins 5-2 on Thursday to avoid a three-game sweep.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gavin Williams throws seven strong innings, three Guardians homer in 5-2 victory over Twins

video.headline: Guardians avoid the sweep with 5-2 win over the Twins

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Guardians avoid the sweep with 5-2 win over the Twins) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

highlights.description: Boston Red Sox vs. Chicago White Sox: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Boston Red Sox vs. Chicago White Sox: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Caleb Durbin hit a two-run homer to help the surging Boston Red Sox top the Chicago White Sox 2-1 on Thursday for their sixth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durbin homers as the Red Sox beat the White Sox 2-1 for their 6th straight win

video.headline: Boston Red Sox vs. Chicago White Sox: Game Highlights

highlights.description: Athletics vs. Detroit Tigers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Athletics vs. Detroit Tigers: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Eduardo Valencia became the 10th Detroit player to homer in his first career plate appearance, Framber Valdez pitched seven innings and the Tigers beat the Athletics 4-1 on Thursday night for a series sweep.
headlines.shortLinkText: Valencia homers in 1st career plate appearance in the Tigers' 4-1 victory over the A's

video.headline: Athletics vs. Detroit Tigers: Game Highlights

highlights.description: Seattle Mariners vs. Miami Marlins: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Seattle Mariners vs. Miami Marlins: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Otto Lopez hit a two-run triple to back a strong five-inning outing by Janson Junk and the Miami Marlins beat the Seattle Mariners 8-4 on Thursday night to extend their winning streak to six.
headlines.shortLinkText: Marlins beat the Mariners 8-4 for a 3-game sweep, extending their win streak to 6

highlights.description: Philadelphia Phillies vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Philadelphia Phillies vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jesús Luzardo allowed two hits in seven innings and struck out 11, Justin Crawford's base hit in the eighth inning drove in the game's only run and the Philadelphia Phillies beat the Cincinnati Reds 1-0 in a pitcher's duel on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jesús Luzardo pitches 11-strikeout gem as Phillies defeat Reds 1-0 in pitcher's duel

video.headline: Philadelphia Phillies vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Philadelphia Phillies vs. Cincinnati Reds: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

events.name: Milwaukee Brewers at St. Louis Cardinals

headlines.description: — Jake Bauers hit a three-run home run, Brice Turang added his 13th homer of the season, and the Milwaukee Brewers used a six-run third inning to rally past the St. Louis Cardinals 8-4 on Thursday night to claim four of five games in the series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bauers and Turang homers help the NL Central-leading Brewers beat the Cardinals 8-4

video.headline: Milwaukee Brewers vs. St. Louis Cardinals: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Milwaukee Brewers vs. St. Louis Cardinals: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET
